LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT DNC PARKS & RESORTS AT TENAYA, INC. MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT OR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION. ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: MOTION DENIED. DEFENDANT'S SEPARATE STATEMENT DOES NOT COMPLY WITH CALIFORNIA RULE OF COURT 3.1350(D) SEPARATELY IDENTIFYING EACH CAUSE OF ACTION. THE NOTICE DOES NOT COMPLY WITH CRC 3.1350(B) SPECIFYING CAUSES OF ACTION TO BE ADJUDICATED. ON THE MERITS, MOTION DENIED FOR FAILURE TO SHIFT BURDEN OF PROOF. INSUFFICIENT LEGALLY ADMISSIBLE EVIDENCE PRESENTED TO SHIFT THE BURDEN OF PROOF. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD, REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE, CSR #5797

Off Calendar Nov-20-2009 Continued To Nov-20-09 At 08:30 A.M. In Dept 608

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Nov-06-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT DNC PARKS & RESORTS AT TENAYA, INC. MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT OR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION. Appearances: Scott Kalkin, Esq. of Roobosstoff & Kalkin (415) 732-0282, appearing for Plaintiff and opposing party; James C. Williams, Esq. Davis Wright Tremaine LLP (415) 276-6505, appearing Defendant and Moving party. Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Motion denied. Defendant's separate statement does not comply with California Rule of Court 3.1350(d) separately identifying each cause of action. The notice does not comply with CRC 3.1350(b) specifying causes of action to be adjudicated. On the merits, motion denied for failure to shift burden of proof. Insufficient legally admissible evidence presented to shift the burden of proof. Order signed in open Court.(302/CWW)Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Court Reporter: Kent Gubbine CSR 5797

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Compel Deposition Testimony Of Pltf Venise Wagner-Guess And For Sanctions Against Pltf And Her Counsel

MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
James C. Williams, Esq., for defendant and moving party: Delaware North Companies Parks and Resorts, Inc.
Scott Kalkin, Esq., for plaintiff and opposing party: Paul Guess

After hearing, Defendant DNC Parks & Resorts at Tenaya, Inc.'s Motion to compel deposition of plaintiff Venise Wagner-Guess; and or sanctions against plaintiff and her counsel is denied. Commissioner: Paul Slavit. Not reported.
